prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone photo of a fashionable young woman posing indoors at a shopping mall entrance at night, full body from a slightly high angle. She has dark brown hair tied in a high side ponytail, with her face intentionally covered by a soft rectangular blur for privacy. She wears a crisp oversized white button-up shirt tucked into a dark gray black plaid pleated mini skirt, loose white scrunch socks, glossy black loafers, and a pale scrunchie on one wrist. She carries one large shiny black shoulder bag on her left shoulder with small dangling charms and a red ribbon accessory. Her pose is shy and casual: one hand raised near her mouth, the other resting lightly on a shiny metal handrail, legs crossed at the ankles. The setting is an upscale indoor mall corridor with reddish brown tiled flooring, stainless steel railings, glass sliding doors behind her, warm cream lighting, a potted green plant visible through the glass, store displays and signage in the background, and a blue-and-white checkered stripe running across the glass doors. Use natural candid phone-camera realism, warm ambient light, detailed reflections in glass and metal, realistic skin tones, shallow but not extreme depth of field, no studio lighting, no watermark, no extra people as the main subject.
